title: TRACE Trust Record
description: A TRACE v0.1 Trust Record — hardware-attested governance evidence for an AI agent execution.

eat_profile.description: EAT profile URI identifying this as a TRACE v0.1 Trust Record.

iat.description: Issued-at time as Unix epoch seconds.

subject.description: Workload identity as a SPIFFE SVID URI.

model_id.description: Model identifier as used by the provider.

weights_digest.description: SHA-256 or SHA-384 digest of the model weights. Required for local/confidential-inference deployments.

aibom_uri.description: URI to SPDX 3.0 AI Profile or CycloneDX 1.7 ML-BOM for this model.

runtime.description: TEE measurement chain binding the workload to hardware.

platform.description: Hardware platform providing the root of trust.

measurement.description: Hardware measurement of the workload (e.g. TDX MRTD, SEV measurement, TPM PCR composite).

rim_uri.description: URI to the vendor-published Reference Integrity Manifest for this measurement.

nonce.description: Freshness nonce binding the attestation report to this record (base64url, no padding).

firmware_version.description: Firmware or microcode version included in the measurement.

policy.description: Policy bundle sealed to the TEE measurement.

bundle_hash.description: SHA-256 or SHA-384 digest of the policy bundle in force at execution time.

enforcement_mode.description: How policy decisions were applied: enforce (block on deny), advisory (log only), silent (no logging).

policy_uri.description: URI to the policy bundle for verification.

data_class.description: Highest-sensitivity data classification of inputs and outputs processed during this execution.

tool_transcript.description: Bound hash of the MCP/A2A tool-call transcript. OPTIONAL for Phase 1 records; REQUIRED for Phase 2+.

hash.description: SHA-256 or SHA-384 digest of the full tool-call transcript, bound into the EAT envelope.

call_count.description: Total number of tool calls in this session.

transcript_uri.description: URI to the full transcript on the transparency log.

build_provenance.description: SLSA provenance for the workload (agent code + container image).

slsa_level.description: SLSA Build Level achieved. Level 2 minimum for TRACE conformance; Level 3 for production mark.

digest.description: SHA-256 or SHA-384 digest of the container image or workload binary.

provenance_uri.description: URI to the SLSA provenance attestation on a Sigstore/Rekor or compatible log.

appraisal.description: Verifier's EAR appraisal of the evidence (draft-ietf-rats-ar4si).

verifier.description: URI identifying the verifier that produced this appraisal.

policy_ref.description: URI to the appraisal policy used.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch seconds when the appraisal was produced.

transparency.description: SCITT receipt URI. The Trust Record is the Signed Statement; this URI resolves to the inclusion proof (Receipt) on the transparency log.

cnf.description: Confirmation key (RFC 8747) — binds the Trust Record to the TEE-held signing key.

jwk.description: JWK (RFC 7517) representing the TEE-sealed public key.
